headline: Fortive To Present at 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference
summary: EVERETT, Wash., March 03, 2026--Fortive Corporation ("Fortive") (NYSE: FTV) today announced that Mark Okerstrom, Chief Financial Officer, will be presenting at the 2026 J.P. Morgan Industrials Conference on Tuesday, March 17th, 2026, at 12:20 p.m. ET. The audio will be simultaneously webcast and achived on the "Investors" section of Fortive’s website, www.fortive.com.
